title: Change 'Launching Soon' to 'Pre-Launch' messaging across subsidiary modals

requirements.text: Update all subsidiary detail modals and any 'Launching Soon' placeholder text/labels to use pre-launch messaging (e.g., 'Coming Soon' or 'Pre-Launch') instead of 'Launching Soon', reflecting that the company has not yet launched.

quotes: not yet launched so pre launch

acceptanceCriteria: No instance of 'Launching Soon' text appears anywhere in the UI.
Subsidiary modals display 'Pre-Launch' or 'Coming Soon' status language consistently.
The PlaceholderPage component also reflects pre-launch messaging if it previously displayed 'Launching Soon'.
The overall tone and styling (black & gold theme) remains unchanged.

constraints: Do not alter the black-and-gold visual theme or any layout/styling.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ that are listed as immutable.
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features beyond the messaging update.
Changing the subsidiary card data or imagery.
Backend changes — the backend remains a static empty actor.
